steps.title: Use the zone threshold
steps.content: The mesophotic zone begins at 30 meters below the surface. To identify the species least suited to a full migration there, focus on maximum depth: the species whose current range stops farthest above 30 meters has the weakest evidence of tolerating mesophotic conditions.

steps.title: Compare the relevant depths
steps.content: Choice A identifies a maximum depth of 25 meters, which is close to the threshold. Choices C and D use minimum depths, which do not show how deep the species can tolerate. The species with a 15-meter maximum depth is farthest from the mesophotic zone. The answer is B.
